_source.note: Oracle-only ANTEX values copied from the trimmed igs20.atx fixture; no parser or correction model is implemented in this change.
_source.units: ANTEX PCO and PCV values are millimeters in north/east/up and grid samples.
_source.selection: Header retained verbatim; GPS PRN blocks selected by validity at the WTZR/WTZZ 120-epoch RINEX date; receiver block selected from ANT # / TYPE headers.
